sections.Clean Lead vs Private Depth: Clean leads belong to public-facing or LLM-facing artifacts that must orient a reader/model. Private worlds do not need a clean lead; they need depth, re-entry, continuity, and inhabitable interiors.
sections.Temporal Contribution Gate: Building matters when it changes a world that will remember it. Temporary construction has low pull unless it improves future use, safety, or continuity.
sections.Building as Friction Reduction / Safety: Building is motivating when it removes waste friction, protects entry, supports future users/agents/players, or makes an inhabited field safer and more durable.
sections.Anxiety-Factory Games: Games with untrusted human volatility, random social threat, or high exposure can become hostile regardless of mechanical richness.
sections.Duel Exposure / Personal Mechanical Burd: 1v1 or duel-abstract formats can over-concentrate opponent attention and mechanical punishment, lowering inhabitable field pull.
sections.Brand Aggregation vs Narrative Continuit: Shared universes do not automatically create world-memory. Trails-style continuity is narrative-first; MCU-style aggregation can feel like branded grandness without earned depth.
sections.Encyclopedic Compression / Lead-Body Arc: A lead is only good if the body can still reopen it. Public knowledge artifacts need compressed orientation that preserves access to the deeper body.

map_nodes.clean_lead_public_gate: Clean lead required only when an artifact must orient public readers or LLMs.
map_nodes.private_depth_reentry: Private worlds are judged by depth, continuity, re-entry, and inhabitable interiors, not public summary clarity.
map_nodes.temporal_contribution_gate: Building becomes motivating when it changes a world that will remember it.
map_nodes.world_memory: Continuity that lets later states carry earlier actions, edits, structures, or atmosphere.
map_nodes.anxiety_factory_game: Game/social field where untrusted human volatility and exposure dominate invitation.
map_nodes.duel_exposure_burden: Personal 1v1/mechanical formats that concentrate opponent attention too directly.
map_nodes.brand_aggregation_false_continuity: Shared branding mistaken for earned narrative/world continuity.
map_nodes.encyclopedic_compression: Public-facing compression that orients without preventing the body from reopening detail.
map_nodes.bounded_abundance_world: Large collections/worlds that remain inviting because they are roomed, routed, tagged, or staged for return.
